config.script:
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#define TMP_REALRECEPT_TABLE_NAME #tmp_real_receptury '#tmp_rentowsp
class CRealReceptPHelper private bDisposed
private sub class_initialize() bDisposed = false
dim strSQL strSQL = "create table TMP_REALRECEPT_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ "(" + vbCrLf +_ "trr_pRecepta integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trr_pSurowiec integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trr_pSurowiecOpak integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trr_curIloscOpakSur decimal(14,4) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trr_curIloscOpakSurIdeal decimal(14,4) not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trr_pWyrob integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ "trr_pWyrobOpak integer not null" + vbCrLf +_ ")" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL 'trans_.execsql "create index TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME##1 on TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME## (trs_id)" end sub
public sub manual_done() if not bDisposed then bDisposed = true
dim strSQL strSQL = "drop table TMP_REALRECEPT_TABLE_NAME" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL
end if end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK manual_done() end sub
public function get_okres_param() dim pOkresParam : set pOkresParam = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_date_range("Analizowany okres").bindexpr("vlp.p_ddatawyst") set get_okres_param = pOkresParam end function
public sub fill_real(byref pOkresParam) #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002, 0 , "DEBUG: fill_real" #endif dim strSQL strSQL = "insert into TMP_REALRECEPT_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ " select vlw.c_pozreal_precepta,vlp.c_pprodukt, vlp.c_popak," + vbCrLf +_ " rou##nd(vlp.c_curiloscopak/vlw.c_curiloscopak,t_jedn.nDokladnosc+1) , " + vbCrLf +_ " 0," + vbCrLf +_ " vlw.c_pprodukt,vlw.c_popak" + vbCrLf +_ " from vlist_n5realprod_listWyrob as vlw" + vbCrLf +_ " inner join vlist_n5realprod_listPozycje as vlp on vlw.p_idobj = vlp.p_idobj" + vbCrLf +_ " inner join n5produkt as t_wyrob on vlw.c_pprodukt = t_wyrob.IdObj " + vbCrLf +_ " inner join n5produkt as t_surow on vlp.c_pprodukt = t_surow.IdObj" + vbCrLf +_ " inner join n5opakowanie_produktu as t_opak_sur on vlp.c_pOpak = t_opak_sur.IdObj " + vbCrLf +_ " inner join n5jednostka as t_jedn on t_opak_sur.pJednOpak=t_jedn.idobj" + vbCrLf +_ " where " + pOkresParam.get_where_part(trans_) + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL
#ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002, 0 , "DEBUG: koniec fill_real" #endif
end sub
public sub fill_real_ideal() #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002, 0 , "DEBUG: fill_real_ideal" #endif
dim strSQL strSQL = "insert into TMP_REALRECEPT_TABLE_NAME " + vbCrLf +_ " select vls.p_idobj,vls.c_pprodukt, vls.c_popak, " + vbCrLf +_ " 0, " + vbCrLf +_ " rou##nd(vls.c_curiloscopak/vlw.c_curiloscopak,t_jedn.nDokladnosc+1) , " + vbCrLf +_ " vlw.c_pprodukt, vlw.c_popak " + vbCrLf +_ " from vlist_n5recepta_listSurowce as vls " + vbCrLf +_ " inner join vlist_n5recepta_listWyrob as vlw on vls.p_idobj=vlw.p_idobj" + vbCrLf +_ " inner join n5produkt as t_wyrob on vlw.c_pprodukt = t_wyrob.IdObj " + vbCrLf +_ " inner join n5produkt as t_surow on vls.c_pprodukt = t_surow.IdObj" + vbCrLf +_ " inner join n5opakowanie_produktu as t_opak_sur on vls.c_pOpak = t_opak_sur.IdObj " + vbCrLf +_ " inner join n5jednostka as t_jedn on t_opak_sur.pJednOpak=t_jedn.idobj" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
public sub prefill() dim strSQL 'prefill table 'strSQL = "insert into TMP_RENTSP_TABLE_NAME select distinct p_idobj, c_idobj," +_ '"0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0 from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania" trans_.execsql strSQL end sub
end class
function new_real_recept set new_real_recept = new CRealReceptPHelper end function
